name: Sugarscape (FLAME GPU)
description: Sugarscape run on the GPU via the flamegpu facade kernel. The engine hands this whole workflow to the Sugarscape_flame backend, which builds and runs a pyflamegpu model. Parameters live in metadata.flamegpu and mirror the CPU SUGARSCAPE workflow for comparison.

metadata.notes: Needs a CUDA GPU + pyflamegpu wheel for the active Python (see backend/flamegpu_backend.py).
